key_decisions: Treat the repository as artifact-first until a Python source package is added.
Use doc/deep-research-report.md and .claude/skills/scifig-generate as the main implementation references.
Document data and output assets during initialization so future work starts from real examples.
blockers: No committed runtime package, CLI, or automated tests exist yet.

deferred.fix_direction: Create a Python package and move workflow behavior from markdown guidance into executable modules.
deferred.description: The repository can describe and demonstrate the workflow, but it cannot yet run end-to-end from committed source.

transition_history.reason: Added missing workflow metadata and performed a full-project deep scan.
